BlackFlag-AP.enable2d10Hint: Changes all standard checks (attack, save, skill, etc.) to use 2d10 instead of 1d20
BlackFlag-AP.overrideInitiativeHint: Initiative modifier now becomes (DEX + WIS) by default
BlackFlag-AP.mana.actorNoManaPoints: {ActorName} doesn't have any resource named {ManaPoints}. Please add a 'Class Feature' Item '{ManaPoints}' to cast this spell. (Item ID: {ManaItem})
BlackFlag-AP.mana.alreadySpItemOwned: There is already a mana point item on this character. Please remove the duplicate.
BlackFlag-AP.mana.autoNote: Enable this setting if you want the module to do the math for you every time a player character advances in a class level or gains a new class.
BlackFlag-AP.mana.casterProgNotes: By standard rules half casters will get their caster level halved when calculating manapoints and will be divided by three for third casters, you can change that here.
BlackFlag-AP.mana.enableChatMessageHint: Select whom to send successful or failed mana point usage messages to
BlackFlag-AP.mana.enableModuleHint: Enables or disables mana points for casting spells. This will override the slot cost for player tokens.
BlackFlag-AP.mana.extraManaTermsNote: append this box's contents to the calculation formula at every level ex. "+ 50" adds 50 extra mana or "* 1.5" increases mana by 50%. To reference a level there is a special notation: ex. "+ ATLEVEL[% @progression.classes.wizard.levels %] * 0.5" which adds 50% more for every wizard level you have
BlackFlag-AP.mana.form: Click the button to open Mana Points System 5e Configuration.
BlackFlag-AP.mana.form-hint: Here you can configure module behavior, mana point cost, and more.
BlackFlag-AP.mana.formulaBaseNote: A single formula used to determine how many mana points a character has and will be recalculated each character level.
BlackFlag-AP.mana.formulaNote: What formula should this module use to calculate the maximum PC mana points and spell cost (default: DMG).
BlackFlag-AP.mana.leveledNotes: The mana points a character would have at any given caster level. You can use formulas, such as: '5+@attributes.spellmod', if you want to add the spellcasting modifier to the fixed number of mana points.
BlackFlag-AP.mana.notEnoughSp: {ActorName} doesn't have enough {ManaPoints} to cast this spell.
BlackFlag-AP.mana.pleaseCreate: Please add a 'Class Feature' Item '{ManaPoints}' to cast this spell. (Item ID: {ManaItem})
BlackFlag-AP.mana.resourceNote: This is the name of the resource on the Player Character Sheet that represents the mana points (default: Mana Points).
BlackFlag-AP.mana.replaceSpellSlotOption: Removes the option to use spell slots from the spell activation dialog. Mana is the only option available.
BlackFlag-AP.mana.manaPointsCostsNote: You don't need to change the mana point costs if you are using the default mana point rules in DMG (page 288). You can use formulas to determine the cost.
BlackFlag-AP.mana.useLeveledProgressionN: If you need calculation on NPC remeber that this setting won't work for casters NPCs since they have no class nor caster level in Foundry. If you want some kind of calculation for caster NPCs, use the single formula (you can do that just for NPCs by overriding this setting on their specific Mana Points item).
BlackFlag-AP.mana.youNotEnough: You don't have enough '{ManaPoints}' to cast this spell.
BlackFlag-AP.mana.spGmOnlyNote: Unchecking this allows every player to override the Mana Points item from their character sheet.
BlackFlag-AP.mana.spGmOnly: Only the GM is allowed to edit the Mana Point Item.
BlackFlag-AP.mana.spOverrideNote1: Using the item, it is possible to have different Mana Points Settings for every character. You can override the mana point configuration by editing the item. If you do it directly in the character sheet, those settings will apply only to that character.
BlackFlag-AP.mana.spOverrideNote2: You could also create multiple different copies of the mana points Item, give those different names, like 'Warlock's ManaSystem', 'Homebrew Psi Points', or anything you want, and reuse those on multiple characters or save them in your compendium and share with the community.
BlackFlag-AP.mana.manaPointsUpdated: Found '{ManaPoints}' on {Actor} character sheet! Your Maximum {ManaPoints} have been updated from {PrevManaPoints} to {NewManaPoints}.
